text: **Anna:** Hello!
**Anna:** Today is a {big|大きな/重要な} day.
**Anna:** My first {children's|子供向けの} show is on television.
**Anna:** Woohoo!
**Anna:** I'm {excited|興奮した/わくわくしている} and {nervous|緊張した}.
**Anna:** Hello, Anna.
**Anna:** Hello, Miss Weaver.
**Anna:** Some people are going to {watch|見る/観察する} your {children's|子供向けの} show.
**Anna:** After they watch it, they'll tell me what they {liked|好きだった} and what they didn't like.
**Anna:** Oh dear, they're in the {conference|会議} room.
**Anna:** Hello everyone.
**Anna:** I'm Anna.
**Anna:** Thanks for coming.
**Anna:** Today you are going to {watch|見る/観察する} my new show.
**Anna:** I hope you {like|好きである} it.
**Anna:** What is the show about?
**Anna:** It is a {children's|子供向けの} show.
**Anna:** But we are not children.
**Anna:** But this {children's|子供向けの} show is {different|異なる/違う}
**Anna:** I hope.
**Anna:** Hmm, I don't really {like|好きである} {children's|子供向けの} shows.
**Anna:** Sh please, sh the show is {starting|始まる}.
**Anna:** Oh hi, just give me one minute.
**Anna:** Oops!
**Anna:** Oh well I can {fix|修理する/直す} that later.
**Anna:** Hello, I'm Anna.
**Anna:** Welcome to the {Time Traveling|タイムトラベル} Tree House.
**Anna:** This is not a usual {treehouse|ツリーハウス}.
**Anna:** It can {time travel|タイムトラベルする}.
**Anna:** That's why it's called the time traveling treehouse.
**Anna:** I'm uh
**MINDY:** Do not {forget|忘れる|/fərˈɡet/|Please don't forget me.} me.
**Anna:** Of course not.
**Anna:** This is my {partner|パートナー/仲間|/ˈpɑːrtnər/|My partner helps me work.}

**Anna:** My name means {massive|巨大な/大規模な|/ˈmæsɪv/|A massive building stands tall.} {information|情報|/ˌɪnfərˈmeɪʃən/|Information is very important.} {navigation|航法/案内|/ˌnævɪˈɡeɪʃən/|Navigation helps us find our way.} device for you.
**Anna:** That means we can {travel|旅行する|/ˈtrævəl/|We travel to many countries.} to many places and learn many things.
**Anna:** Kids from all over the {world|世界|/wɜːrld/|The world is very big.} ask us questions.
**Anna:** We find them answers.
**MINDY:** Woo-hoo!
**MINDY:** That is right, Anna.
**Anna:** Mindy, what is our first {question|質問|/ˈkwestʃən/|I have a question for you.}?
**MINDY:** Layla asks us this question.
**Anna:** Hello, Mana.
**Anna:** Hello, Mandy.
**Layla:** I'd like to know how do you {play|プレーする/演じる|/pleɪ/|Let's play a game.} baseball?
**Anna:** That is a great question.
**Anna:** Mindy, we need to find her an answer.
**MINDY:** I know that we can find it, Anna.
**Anna:** Where am I now?
**Anna:** Mindy, now I am on a {snowy|雪の|/ˈsnoʊi/|A snowy mountain looks beautiful.} mountain.
**MINDY:** That is a good place to learn how to {ski|スキーをする|/skiː/|I love to ski in winter.}.
**Anna:** Yes, Mindy, but it cannot teach us about baseball.
**Anna:** And I don't know how to ski.
**MINDY:** Sorry, Anna.
**MINDY:** Let's try again.
**Anna:** Where am I now?
**Anna:** Cindy, I am in an {ocean|海|/ˈoʊʃən/|The ocean is very deep.}!
**Anna:** An ocean cannot teach us about baseball!
**MINDY:** Please don't {yell|叫ぶ|/jel/|Don't yell at me.}, Anna
**MINDY:** The ocean can teach us about {surfing|サーフィン|/ˈsɜːrfɪŋ/|Surfing is a fun sport.}.
**Anna:** Yes, Mindy.
**MINDY:** It can {teach|教える/学ばせる|/tiːtʃ/|I teach English to students.} us about {surfing|サーフィン|/ˈsɜːrfɪŋ/|Surfing is a fun water sport.}
**Anna:** And sharks!
**Anna:** Ah
**Anna:** Anna!
**MINDY:** Please wait.
**MINDY:** I need to {fix|修理する/直す|/fɪks/|Can you fix my bicycle?} my {navigation|ナビゲーション/道案内|/nævɪˈɡeɪʃn/|Navigation helps us find our way.} device.
**Anna:** Fix it faster and get me out of here now!
**Anna:** Whoa, is Anna going to be {lost|迷子の/失われた|/lɔːst/|I got lost in the city.} forever?
**Anna:** Next week you can watch part two of the Time Traveling Treehouse.
**Anna:** Aw man, will the {shark|サメ|/ʃɑːrk/|Sharks live in the ocean.} eat her?
**Anna:** Will Anna find the answer?
**MINDY:** Please tell us the ending.
**Anna:** So you liked it?
**Anna:** Yes!
**Anna:** Well you can watch the ending next week.
**Anna:** No!
**Anna:** Don't forget to watch next week
